svg.title: VendorHub final workflow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end workflow for VendorHub vendor management system with two lanes: vendor and staff/admin

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about VendorHub registration')
sendPrompt('How does email verification work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the VendorHub booth application form')
sendPrompt('What documents does a vendor upload in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a vendor submits in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does the staff review queue work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff verify vendor documents in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What can a vendor change when resubmitting in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does booth assignment work in VendorHub?')
g.text: Staff picks based on booth type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does invoicing work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does a vendor pay their invoice in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff record offline payments in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What does the approval confirmation email contain in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What does the vendor receive in their confirmation email from VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does vendor sign-in work at the event in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff mark vendor check-in in VendorHub?')
